mapper.select: SELECT id, space_uuid, owner_user_id, name, space_type, status, created_at, updated_at FROM spaces WHERE owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId} AND space_type = 'personal' AND status = 1 ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO spaces (space_uuid, owner_user_id, name, space_type, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{spaceUuid}, #{ownerUserId}, #{name}, #{spaceType}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
